creator: wbe@psr.com
text:
Probably to no one else's surprise ... It looks like both Amazonbot and Googlebot index this page, because they both have now fetched my calendars.html page, and this is the only place that refers to it.  Google, OTOH, might have discovered it via someone on the mailing list for this bug having a GMail account.  Not a problem -- I just (mistakenly) thought the search engines wouldn't find the page until I added it to my web site's home page.

In minor news, I released calendar-2.1 and calendars-2025.3 last month.

Also, I no longer recommend the tarball version I uploaded here originally.  I'd delete all the attachments except the 0.9.3 bug fix patch if I could, but there doesn't seem to be a way to do that.
